news.t: Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs

holdings.infoBox: IVOV is an equity ETF with a total of 307 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alcoa stock at 1.19%, Reliance at 1.18%, TD SYNNEX at 1.16%, US Foods Holding at 1.07%, and WESCO International at 1.04%.

overview.description: The Vanguard S&P Mid-Cap 400 Value ETF (IVOV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 Value index. The fund tracks an index of value-style securities from the Committee-selected S&P mid-cap 400. IVOV was launched on Sep 9, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs
data.text: VALLEY FORGE, Pa. , Feb. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vanguard today announced plans to execute forward share splits for six equity ETFs.

data.title: Best Value ETFs for Q2 2021
data.text: The best value ETFs for Q2 2021 are RZV, RFV, and IVOV.
